whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Team

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Service?

servicesPage.intro: Sanchez Auto Service offers a full range of auto repair and maintenance services in Dallas, TX. From brakes to engines, we've got you covered.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake service to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Our brake services include pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, caliper repair, and brake fluid flush. We use high-quality parts to restore stopping power and extend the life of your braking system.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We perform a comprehensive brake inspection, checking pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Faulty components are replaced or repaired using OEM-quality parts.

process.title: Testing
process.description: We test the brakes on the road to ensure optimal performance and safety.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, depending on driving habits and conditions.

faqs.question: Do you offer brake warranties?
faqs.answer: Yes, all brake services come with a parts and labor warranty for your peace of mind.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair.
services.longDescription: Using advanced diagnostic tools, we pinpoint engine issues quickly and accurately. Services include check engine light diagnosis, sensor replacement, timing belt service, and more.
benefits: Efficient repairs save time and money
Improved engine performance and fuel economy

process.title: Scan & Analyze
process.description: We connect to your vehicle's computer to retrieve trouble codes and data.

process.title: Inspect & Test
process.description: Our technicians perform hands-on tests to confirm the root cause.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We complete the repair and re-scan to ensure the issue is resolved.

faqs.question: What does the check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Typically 1-2 hours, depending on the complexity of the issue.

services.title: Oil Change & Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular maintenance.
services.longDescription: Our oil change service includes high-quality oil and filter replacement, fluid level checks, and a multi-point inspection to catch potential issues early.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil and replace it with the manufacturer-recommended grade.

process.title: Filter Change
process.description: A new oil filter is installed to maintain oil cleanliness.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, and tire pressure as part of our preventive maintenance.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,500 miles for most modern vehicles, or as recommended by your owner's manual.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional and synthetic oil options to suit your vehicle's needs.

services.title: AC & Heating System Service
services.longDescription: We diagnose and repair air conditioning and heating system issues, including refrigerant recharge, compressor replacement, and heater core repairs.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and all components.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: Using UV dye and electronic detectors, we find and seal leaks.

process.title: Service & Test
process.description: We repair or replace faulty parts, recharge the system, and verify performance.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak in the system.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years to ensure optimal performance.

about.headline: Family-Owned Auto Repair Since 1995
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that keeps Dallas drivers safe and satisfied.
story: Sanchez Auto Service was founded in 1995 by Master Technician Carlos Sanchez with a simple philosophy: treat every customer like family. Starting from a small two-bay shop, Carlos built a reputation for honest diagnostics and fair pricing. Over the years, the business grew as word spread about the team's dedication to quality.

Today, Sanchez Auto Service continues that tradition with a team of experienced mechanics who share the same values. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and ongoing training to serve the evolving needs of modern vehicles. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine repair, we approach every job with the same commitment to excellence.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs — and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We proudly serve Dallas and support local causes.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: Clear estimates and open communication every step of the way.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Visit us or call to schedule your next service.
